hi! my name is . i’m a foundation scholar in computer science and linguistics at trinity college, dublin; my interests include in computing, language, and ….

right now, i’m doing computational neuroscience research at the di liberto lab, organising schools debating events as librarian of the hist, and reading a lot of books.

you can find some projects i’ve worked on here and some posts i’ve written here.

feel free to get in touch at oscurran [at] gmail [dot] com.
